100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On June 20, 1926, the world buzzed with significant developments. In Germany, the government faced a political crisis as the nation grappled with economic instability and rising tensions. Meanwhile, in the United States, the ongoing effects of Prohibition continued to stir debate, with calls for reform gaining traction. Across the Atlantic, the British Empire celebrated the coronation of King Edward VIII, marking a new chapter in royal history.
Updated: Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 08:17:20 AM CDT
